level_signals: at least 3 years of direct management experience leading data science or ML teams
10 years of overall data science experience
Works with senior leadership and Stripe leaders across the company
Member of Stripe's data science management team

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: A PhD or MS or BS in a quantitative field (e.g., Statistics, Operations Research, Economics, Computer Science, Engineering).
You have at least 3 years of direct management experience leading data science or ML teams, and 10 years of overall data science experience.
must_haves.qualifier: direct management of data science or ML teams; 10 years overall data science

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have demonstrated expertise in designing metrics and guiding business decisions with data.
You have technical expertise to drive clarity with staff and senior scientists about architecture and strategic modeling decisions.
You've managed teams that have built and shipped machine learning systems and data products at scale, and have hands-on experience with challenging problems.
You work very well cross-functionally, and are able to think rigorously and make hard decisions and tradeoffs.
You have clear and persuasive communication skills in writing and verbally.
You thrive on a high level of autonomy and responsibility.
You foster a healthy, inclusive, challenging, and supportive work environment.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You are comfortable working with geographically distributed teams
Expertise in time series forecasting, predictive modeling, or optimization
Expertise in data design and building scalable data architectures

scope.surface: Growth Data Science — user journey from awareness and acquisition through product adoption, usage growth, and retention
primary_metrics_inferred: Experimentation throughput and causal impact measurement
core_responsibilities: Drive the roadmap and priorities for your team, and work with many Stripe leaders across the company to enhance our ability to be data driven.
Collaborate with stakeholders across the organization such as engineering, analytics, operations, finance, and marketing.
Lead and manage processes to help the team do its best work and engage effectively with the rest of Stripe
Manage a high-performing team of data scientists, supporting them to achieve a high level of technical excellence and advance in their careers.
Recruit and onboard great data scientists, in collaboration with Stripe's recruiting team
Contribute to broad data science initiatives as a member of Stripe's data science management team.

green_flags: Clear team mission and scope described (Growth Data Science, experimentation powerhouse)
Explicit minimum vs. preferred requirements distinction — encourages candidates who meet minimums to apply
Strong cross-functional partnerships described (Sales, Marketing, Engineering, Risk, etc.)
Stripe's scale and mission ('increase the GDP of the internet') are compelling for senior candidates
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — candidates cannot determine work arrangement
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
Combined 10 years of data science experience + 3 years management is a high bar that narrows the pool significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years of experience requirements and team scope)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from team description; not explicitly stated in JD)
location.type (not stated in JD; set to 'unclear')
ambiguities: Location and remote/hybrid policy are not mentioned anywhere in the JD. It is unclear whether this role is onsite, hybrid, or remote.
The minimum requirement lists 'PhD or MS or BS' with no preference ordering; severity is treated as hard but the degree level floor is a BS, making it somewhat accessible.
Team size is not mentioned; left as 'unclear'.
